pages.heroTitle:
Stadium Experience represents some of the best sporting conference, meeting and event facilities.
We offer unique and prestigious stadium venues across the UK, for you to host your next conference, meeting or event.
pages.heroSubtitle: Search by city, postcode, club or stadium
paragraphs: Search by city, postcode, club or stadium

Stadium Experience is a not-for-profit marketing collaboration of over 70 football, rugby and cricket club venues across the UK.  These prestigious, iconic and unique venues all work together to promote stadia as ideal venues for your next conference, meeting, exhibition or party.

Search for your next stadium venue using the search bar above, or use our new Stadium Search Page  - We don’t charge commission.  You can also download our Stadium Venue Guide showing the stadium venues we work with.  This includes venue capacities and contact details to make your venue enquiry as quick and easy as possible.
Sign-up for our monthly newsletters and Stadium Venue Guide sent twice a year, to ensure you receive the very latest stadium venue news first.

Stadium Experience is a not-for-profit marketing collaboration made up of 70+ UK stadium venues.  The association was set-up by the clubs themselves to promote stadium venues for conference and events.  If you work in a football, rugby or cricket club in the UK and have conference and events facilities to promote, then your venue is eligible to join Stadium Experience.

Do you have a product or service ideal for use in a stadium?  We can help you open those initial doors and connect you with stadium venues to showcase your business.  Present at our members meetings, advertise to stadium venues or support our annual Stadium Events & Hospitality Awards event which welcomes key decision makers from stadium venues across the UK.
Sign up for our newsletter and receive our twice yearly stadium guide

pages.heroTitle: Stadium Experience - Promoting unique stadium venues
pages.heroSubtitle: Established in 2002, Stadium Experience is a not-for-profit marketing collaboration of over 70 football, rugby and cricket club venues across the UK.  These prestigious, iconic and unique venues all work together to promote stadia as ideal venues for conferences, banqueting, meetings, exhibitions and parties.
paragraphs: Established in 2002, Stadium Experience is a not-for-profit marketing collaboration of over 70 football, rugby and cricket club venues across the UK.  These prestigious, iconic and unique venues all work together to promote stadia as ideal venues for conferences, banqueting, meetings, exhibitions and parties.

Stadium venues pay an annual subscription to join the Stadium Experience team and have access to all of our activities , such as; regular members meetings to share best practice and ideas with like-minded professionals, exhibitions and agent networking , digital marketing support, supplier group discounts , awards recognition with our annual Stadium Events & Hospitality Awards and more…

Stadium Experience was set-up by the clubs themselves in 2002 to promote stadium venues for conference and events.  If you work in a football, rugby, cricket or athletics club in the UK and have conference and events facilities to promote, then your venue is eligible to join Stadium Experience.
Members of Stadium Experience are eligible for a range of group discounts.

pages.heroSubtitle: Stadium Experience is a not-for-profit membership association, with over 70 stadium venues - See what our venues say about us .  Stadium venues pay an annual subscription to join the team and have access to our activities, which includes:
paragraphs: Stadium Experience is a not-for-profit membership association, with over 70 stadium venues - See what our venues say about us .  Stadium venues pay an annual subscription to join the team and have access to our activities, which includes:
All members are invited to share best practice and ideas, bring relevant topics to the table, as well as meeting potential suppliers.  Presentation opportunities available.
We have created the opportunity for the Public Catering & Kiosk Managers at each club to attend and share best practice and ideas in their own meeting space. Presentation opportunities available.

Come together with stadium colleagues to meet key suppliers, hear the latest industry trends and motivational speakers.  Open to both the Sales/Hospitality group and the Public Catering Group.  See more about the next event.
Visit and connect with other clubs to share ideas and provide feedback to aid improvements.

Opportunity to enter exclusive member-only award categories at The Stadium Events and Hospitality Awards .   All members also receive priority booking, and are eligible for 2 free tickets each year, plus reduced rates to attend the event held in June/July at one of our member venues.   Sponsorship opportunities available .

Stadium Experience arranges regular meetings for clubs to visit agents and present details on Stadium Experience members.   Recent collaborators have included; arrangeMY, Calders, Conference Care, Choose Your Event, Edge Venues, Off Limits, Venue Directory and more.

The opportunity to stand-share and have a presence at exhibitions at a reduced price and subsidised by Stadium Experience.   Recent examples include CHS Birmingham, CHS Manchester, Inspirational Venue Roadshow, The Meetings Show, The PA Show, 20/20 Speed Networking Events and more.
Each member has dedicated club pages to promote their conference and events facilities, and upload brochures.
Venues are also able to promote their latest news stories and job vacancies via the Stadium Experience website and social media.

Regular promotional literature is produced and sent to key event bookers across the UK, such as our Stadium Venue Guide .   Also available is PDFs downloads on the Stadium Experience website and official email footers.
Stadium Experience has regular national advertisements and media coverage in conference and events media.

pages.pageTitle: Stadium Events & Hospitality Awards - Stadium Experience
paragraphs: Home » Stadium Events & Hospitality Awards

The Stadium Events & Hospitality Awards is an annual award programme organised by Stadium Experience .  The awards were founded in 2005 by members of Stadium Experience to recognise the very best UK football stadia venues (known then at The Football Hospitality Awards). The awards programme has since evolved to include UK rugby and cricket stadia in line with the growing membership of Stadium Experience .

Today, the prestigious awards recognise and raise the profile of the fantastic commitment of the matchday hospitality and specialist events teams that work tirelessly at stadium venues across the UK.  All of the awards are independently judged by experienced industry experts.  There are also fantastic opportunities for sponsors and suppliers interested in promoting their products and services to around 450 stadium decision makers from venues across the UK.
Find out more about the awards on our Frequently Asked Questions page .
Sign up for our newsletter and receive our twice yearly stadium guide

pages.pageTitle: Product or service - Promote your business to 70+ stadium venues
pages.heroTitle: If you would like to find out more, please contact office@stadiumexperience.com
pages.heroSubtitle: Stadium Experience is a not-for-profit marketing collaboration with over 70 major football, rugby and cricket club members.  We have many opportunities for you to showcase your business.  Our main audiences are sales teams (matchday and non-matchday), as well as public catering and retail kiosk managers.
paragraphs: Stadium Experience is a not-for-profit marketing collaboration with over 70 major football, rugby and cricket club members.  We have many opportunities for you to showcase your business.  Our main audiences are sales teams (matchday and non-matchday), as well as public catering and retail kiosk managers.

We have a number of opportunities to help get your products and services in front of decision-makers at stadium venues.   Present at our  members meetings , exhibit at our Industry Meetings, advertise to stadium venues, give an exclusive offer or incentive  to our venues, or  sponsor our annual Stadium Events & Hospitality Awards  event which welcomes representatives from stadium venues across the UK. See supplier testimonials from companies that have worked with us.

Stadium Experience meets regularly to discuss the latest industry updates and share best practice.  As part of these meetings, we can provide time for companies to present their product or service for use in stadium venues.  The benefit of this opportunity is meeting many clubs all at one time, saving time and money in travelling to each club individually.  This is the ideal opportunity for companies to get that initial foot in the door, and enable further discussions.

Stadium Experience has created a new series of events - The Stadium Experience Industry Meeting.  This is an in-person event for our member venues to network face-to-face with like-minded colleagues from other stadium venues, meet suppliers, hear from key industry speakers on the latest top trends, and feel inspired.  There are two audiences - the Non-Matchday & Hospitality Sales Teams, and the Retail Catering Teams.  Please view the video to get a feel for the event.

As part of this event, we offer time for a Mini-Expo for guests to meet suppliers and touch and even taste sample products which may be suitable to use in their own venues.  Read more about exhibition opportunities.

The Stadium Events and Hospitality Awards offers an excellent opportunity to raise your profile to top stadia venues (football, rugby and cricket), with around 500 guests in attendance on the night, from around 70 stadium venues across the UK.  Guests include decision-makers from teams such as sales, conference and events, matchday hospitality, chef teams, public catering teams, operational departments and senior management attending to share the celebrations and network.  Please view the video of our 2024 event at Leeds United FC.
Advertise your products and services on the Stadium Experience website or sponsor our newsletters. Promote your company to 250+ contacts at our 70+ stadium venues.

If you have a special offer or discount rate for Stadium Experience venues, we can help share this to our 400+ contacts at our 70+ stadium venues.  Have your offer emailed to our venues, and feature on our dedicated Group Discounts page .
January - Advertise in our Quarterly Newsletter to 250+ Stadium Experience Members.
12th January - Presentation Opportunity at Members Meeting For Non-Matchday & Hospitality Sales Managers (on Zoom)
13th January - Presentation Opportunity at Members Meeting For Retail Managers (on Zoom)
Read more about the opportunities available to promote your business to our stadium venues.

pages.heroSubtitle: Reach stadium venues and venue finders using Stadium Experience’s services.  There are flexible packages available.  Options include; advertising on the Stadium Experience website (with links to your own site), or sponsoring our quarterly email newsletter.
paragraphs: Reach stadium venues and venue finders using Stadium Experience’s services.  There are flexible packages available.  Options include; advertising on the Stadium Experience website (with links to your own site), or sponsoring our quarterly email newsletter.

Our email newsletters are issued quarterly to 250+ contacts at our 70+ member venues .  This is an internal newsletter to our member venues to give a round-up of recent activities and upcoming opportunities available to them with a high open rate of over 60%.  Sponsorship of our newsletter would include up to 100 words and landscape image to promote your products or services.  You could also feature a special offer.  Only one sponsor is featured per edition.
For further details, please contact Debbie Rigney at office@stadiumexperience.com .
Sign up for our newsletter and receive our twice yearly stadium guide

paragraphs: Home » Venues » Download Venue Guide
You can download our  Stadium Venue Guide showing the UK stadium venues we work with .  This includes venue capacities and contact details to make your venue enquiry as quick and easy as possible.
Receive the latest Stadium Venue Guide sent twice a year by email - Sign Up Here .

Enquiries can be made to the stadium venues directly, or via Stadium Experience – often handy if you need to contact multiple venues at once. Stadium Experience does not charge any commission for this service. You can contact Stadium Experience with your enquiry at office@stadiumexperience.com or 0345 226 5494 .

Stadium Experience also sends a monthly email newsletter with the very latest news and discount offers from stadium venues across the UK and Ireland. Receive news, updates and special offers first by opting-in to our newsletter. View the most recent stadium venue offers .

pages.heroSubtitle: Book your 2026 Christmas party in a prestigious and iconic venue, steeped in sporting history.  Stadium Experience has a fantastic choice of over 70 football, rugby and cricket clubs across the UK, each with their own unique twist for this year’s festive party.  Stadium venues can offer top-class service, pitch-views and award-winning cuisine for the ultimate Christmas celebration.   Choose from your own private celebrations, shared parties throughout the festive season, traditional Christmas dinners, dancing the night away, comedy nights or even breakfast with Santa!
